test-case.description: [network/azure-firewall] Set-ModuleReadMe script should not apply any updates.

failure.message: Expected $null or empty, because Failed to apply the Set-ModuleReadMe function due to an error during the function's execution. Please review the inner error(s)., but got Failed to compile [/home/runner/work/bicep-registry-modules/bicep-registry-modules/avm/res/network/azure-firewall/main.bicep].
failure.stack-trace: at $InvocationError[-1] | Should -BeNullOrEmpty -Because "Failed to apply the `Set-ModuleReadMe` function due to an error during the function's execution.
